title: Origins: Heaven Guard
description: A legend held that the Frost Wolves guarded the gates of heaven where they had the power to reject anyone who had been cruel to dogs or wolves during their time on earth.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

# Heaven Guard

**A legend held that the Frost Wolves guarded the gates of heaven where they had the power to reject anyone who had been cruel to dogs or wolves during their time on earth.**

## Passives

- 💨Swifty mobility
  - You run 10% faster, and leap horizontaly when sneak jumping. You take no fall damage.
- 🩸Leap Bite
  - When leaping, you bite first target in front, Applying Slow and Weakness.
- 🥩Meat Eater Food
  - Meat are more saturation on you. Non-Meat will give less then usual.
- 🦴Pack Leader's Roar
  - Every three attack, you will summon a wolves fight for you. But they will take damage over time.
- ❄️Blizzard being
  - You have Particles around you when moving.

- Any question can ask in the discord server ::: )
